note: A cafe point-of-sale receipt: a tidy JSON object with line items and a total.
A rideshare receipt: also JSON, but every field is named differently (company/amount_charged/trip_date).
A hotel folio: not JSON at all, just the raw printed lines as one text blob.
raw:
Harbor Grand Hotel
Folio #88231
Check-in: 2026-06-06   Check-out: 2026-06-07
Room charge: 240.00
City tax: 28.40
Amount due: 268.40

note: Well-formed, but the vendor is not in the ledger -- a clean 'no match', not a parse failure.
The malformed case: no recoverable vendor, an unparseable amount. The tool must give up gracefully.
